title: Elastic (ESTC) Earnings Dates, Call Summary & Reports
text: Elastic (ESTC) Earnings Dates, Call Summary and Reports. Most Recent Earnings: Q3 FY2026 announced February 26, 2026. Revenue $450 million, up 18% YoY. Adjusted EPS beat expectations. Next Earnings Date: Q4 FY2026 expected May 28, 2026. Earnings History: ESTC has beaten earnings expectations consistently over past four quarters. Over the last two years, company beaten EPS estimates 100% of the time. Similarly beaten revenue estimates 100% of the time over two-year period. Historical EPS Trends: FY2024: Achieved profitability with EPS around $0.21 per quarter. FY2025: Profitability improved with quarterly EPS averaging $0.37 per quarter. FY2026: Guidance for full-year EPS of $2.50-$2.54. Revenue Trends: FY2024: Revenue $1.267 billion, 19% growth. FY2025: Revenue $1.483 billion, 17% growth. FY2026: Guidance $1.734-$1.736 billion, 17% growth at midpoint. Key Metrics to Watch: Customer additions and expansion metrics. Cloud revenue growth rates. Operating margin progression. Free cash flow generation. AI adoption penetration and revenue contribution. Analyst Expectations: Average analyst EPS estimate for next quarter: $0.64. Revenue estimate next quarter: $445-447 million. Full-year earnings forecast showing strong profitability trajectory.
